# Ralph Progress Log
Started: 2025-01-01
---

## Codebase Patterns
- Use `sql<number>` template for aggregations
- Always use `IF NOT EXISTS` for migrations
- Export types from actions.ts for UI components

## 2025-01-01 10:00 - US-001
- Added schema
- Files: db/schema.ts
- Learnings: migrations need IF NOT EXISTS
---

## 2025-01-01 11:00 - US-002
- Added endpoint
- Files: api/users.ts
- Learnings: use zod for input validation

## 2025-01-01 12:00 - US-003
- Added component
- Files: ui/UserList.tsx
- Learnings: import types from actions.ts
